# MRPack to ZIP

> Browser-based Minecraft modpack conversion tools for MRPack and CurseForge ZIP formats.

## Core Pages

- [MRPack to ZIP Converter](https://mrpacktozip.pro/)
- [ZIP to MRPack Converter](https://mrpacktozip.pro/zip-to-mrpack)
- [Chinese MRPack to ZIP Converter](https://mrpacktozip.pro/zh)
- [Chinese ZIP to MRPack Converter](https://mrpacktozip.pro/zh/zip-to-mrpack)

## Trust Pages

- [About](https://mrpacktozip.pro/about)
- [About - Chinese](https://mrpacktozip.pro/zh/about)
- [Privacy Policy](https://mrpacktozip.pro/privacy)
- [Privacy Policy - Chinese](https://mrpacktozip.pro/zh/privacy)
- [Terms of Use](https://mrpacktozip.pro/terms)
- [Terms of Use - Chinese](https://mrpacktozip.pro/zh/terms)
- [Contact](https://mrpacktozip.pro/contact)
- [Contact - Chinese](https://mrpacktozip.pro/zh/contact)

## Site Notes

- MRPack to ZIP converts Modrinth `.mrpack` packages into launcher-ready ZIP files.
- ZIP to MRPack converts CurseForge modpack ZIP exports into Modrinth-compatible MRPack files.
- Browser-based conversion is preferred where the source format allows it.
- CurseForge ZIP conversion uses a protected server-side CurseForge API proxy for metadata and download authorization.
- Support and policy contact: contact@mrpacktozip.pro
